summary: Iteration 14: Date Filtering Bug Fix Verified. All dates now stored in ISO YYYY-MM-DD format. Date filtering works correctly on /api/summary and /api/role endpoints. Frontend date filter UI sends YYYY-MM-DD format and filters work as expected.

backend: Dates stored in ISO format: Rishi=2026-03-24, Gautham=2026-03-23, Madhumithaa=2026-03-25, Harshini=2026-03-26, Jona=2026-03-27
GET /api/summary without date filter: returns all 5 applicants
GET /api/role without date filter: returns all 5 applicants
GET /api/role with startDate=2026-03-24&endDate=2026-03-26: returns 3 applicants (Rishi, Madhumithaa, Harshini)
POST /api/reprocess: correctly re-normalizes dates in existing data
frontend: Dashboard loads with correct status counts (5 naukri, 5 pipeline, 5 registered)
/summary page date filter UI works - sends YYYY-MM-DD format
/roles/:jobRole filter 2026-03-24 to 2026-03-26 shows 3 applicants (Rishi, Madhumithaa, Harshini)
/roles/:jobRole correctly excludes Gautham (2026-03-23) and Jona (2026-03-27) when filtered

date_format_fix.root_cause: Dates were stored as DD-Mon-YYYY (e.g. '24-Mar-2026') but filters send YYYY-MM-DD ('2026-03-24')
date_format_fix.fix_applied: normalize_date() converts all date formats to ISO YYYY-MM-DD before storage

date_filtering./api/summary: Working - filters by date_of_application using ISO string comparison
date_filtering./api/role: Working - filters by date_of_application using ISO string comparison

seed_data_creation: Test data files at /app/testdata/naukri_test.xlsx and /app/testdata/pipeline_test.xlsx with 5 applicants each
context_for_next_testing_agent: Date filtering bug is FIXED. All dates are now stored in ISO YYYY-MM-DD format. The normalize_date() function in server.py handles DD-MMM-YYYY, DD-MM-YYYY, and YYYY-MM-DD formats. Both /api/summary and /api/role endpoints correctly filter by date_of_application. Frontend date inputs use type='date' which natively sends YYYY-MM-DD. Score sheet collection is empty (score_sheet_count=0) in this test iteration.
